---
name: ❓ Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: ['question', 'needs-answer']
assignees: ''

---

## ❓ Question
<!-- Ask your question here. Be as specific as possible. -->

## 🎯 Context
<!-- Provide context for your question. What are you trying to achieve? -->
- **Goal**: <!-- What are you trying to accomplish? -->
- **Current Situation**: <!-- Describe your current situation -->
- **What you've tried**: <!-- What have you already tried? -->

## 📋 Details
<!-- Add any additional details that might help answer your question. -->
- **Code Examples**: <!-- Add relevant code examples -->
- **Screenshots**: <!-- Add screenshots if applicable -->
- **Error Messages**: <!-- Copy any error messages -->
- **Logs**: <!-- Add relevant logs -->

## 🌍 Environment Information
<!-- Please complete the following information. -->
- **Device**: <!-- e.g., iPhone 12, Samsung Galaxy S21 -->
- **Operating System**: <!-- e.g., iOS 14.7, Android 11 -->
- **Browser**: <!-- e.g., Chrome 91.0.4472.124, Safari 14.1.1 -->
- **App Version**: <!-- e.g., v1.2.3 -->
- **Language**: <!-- Hindi/English -->

## 🔍 Research Done
<!-- What have you already researched? -->
- **Documentation**: <!-- What documentation have you checked? -->
- **Issues**: <!-- Have you checked existing issues? -->
- **Discussions**: <!-- Have you checked discussions? -->
- **Stack Overflow**: <!-- Have you searched Stack Overflow? -->

## 🎯 Expected Answer
<!-- What kind of answer are you looking for? -->
- **Solution**: <!-- Are you looking for a specific solution? -->
- **Explanation**: <!-- Do you need an explanation? -->
- **Guidance**: <!-- Are you looking for guidance? -->
- **Best Practices**: <!-- Are you asking about best practices? -->

## 🌐 Language Specific
<!-- Is your question specific to Hindi or English? -->
- **Hindi**: <!-- Hindi-specific questions -->
- **English**: <!-- English-specific questions -->
- **Both**: <!-- Questions about both languages -->

## 📞 Contact Information
<!-- Optional: If you want us to follow up with you -->
- **Email**: <!-- Your email -->
- **Twitter**: <!-- Your Twitter handle -->
- **Discord**: <!-- Your Discord username -->

---

## 🙏 Thank You!

Thank you for asking your question! We'll do our best to help you.

**हिंदी में**: अपना प्रश्न पूछने के लिए धन्यवाद! हम आपकी मदद करने के लिए अपना सर्वश्रेष्ठ प्रयास करेंगे।
